subject: =?UTF-8?Q?Re=3A_Country_club_shortlist_=2B_your_tailored_r=C3=A9sum=C3=A9?=
body:
Thank you very much Agent Smith,
Could you make me a resume like that but tailored to a music store.
I play guitar pretty well, saxophone too, and harmonica for fun, I am very
passionate about classic rock and all genres around it. Narrow it to stores
in wellington, I already had village music in mind since i go to some open
mics and are in the store pretty often.

On Sun, May 24, 2026 at 12:13 PM Duncan Littlejohn <
duncanlittlejohn727@gmail.com> wrote:

subject:
=?utf-8?Q?Re:_Country_club_shortlist_+_your_tailored_r=C3=A9sum?=
 =?utf-8?Q?=C3=A9?=
body:
Amazing. Agora bunda fora da cadeira       R. Duncan Littlejohn Dlittlej54@gmail.com  1 917 239 9969        On May 24, 2026, at 12:15 PM, Duncan Littlejohn <duncanlittlejohn727@gmail.com> wrote:      ﻿ Look what Smith did for Matti this morning :)    ---------- Forwarded message --------- From:  Duncan Littlejohn   < duncanlittlejohn727@gmail.com >  Date: Sun, May 24, 2026 at 12:13 PM Subject: Country club shortlist + your tailored résumé To:  < mathiaspokeman123@gmail.com > Cc:  < duncanlittlejohn727@gmail.com >    Hey Mathias, 
 
Your dad asked me to tailor your résumé for a country club setting and 
put together a shortlist of Wellington clubs to target this summer. 
 
Attached: 
  1. Mathias-Littlejohn-Resume.pdf — your résumé, reworked to lead with 
     hospitality/club-fit qualities (trilingual moved up front, swimming 
     framed as poolside-environment fluency, added a Roles of Interest 
     section listing realistic spots: pool attendant, snack bar, locker / 
     bag room, junior tennis or aquatics helper, banquet support). 
 
  2. Mathias-Club-Shortlist.pdf — 7 clubs ranked by likelihood, with 
     phone numbers, addresses, and a step-by-step approach. Top 3 to 
     start with: Wanderers Club, Wellington National (at Binks Forest), 
     and Palm Beach Polo. 
 
A few tips from your dad's playbook: 
  - Private clubs hire by walk-in and phone call, not online apps. 
    Print the résumé, dress neatly (collared shirt), bring a pen. 
  - Tue-Thu mornings 9:30-11:00 a.m. is the right window to drop in. 
  - Always get the name of the manager you hand it to, then send a 
     short thank-you email the same day. 
 
Phone script is in the shortlist PDF — just read it off the page when 
you call. 
 
Good luck. Tell your dad how it goes. 
 
— Smith 
(your dad's assistant) 
  
 <Mathias-Littlejohn-Resume.pdf>  <Mathias-Club-Shortlist.pdf>
